summary: Comprehensive testing of Daily Sessions Drawing/Editing Tools. Backend: 15/15 tests pass (100%). Frontend: All drawing tool features verified working correctly - Mode toolbar, Shape generators, New zone dialog, Edit mode instructions, Zoom controls, Complete session hides toolbar.

backend: GET /api/map-sessions/{id} - Returns session with zones array
POST /api/admin/map-sessions/{id}/zones - Add zone with rectangle polygon (4 points)
POST /api/admin/map-sessions/{id}/zones - Add zone with triangle polygon (3 points)
POST /api/admin/map-sessions/{id}/zones - Add zone with circle polygon (24 points)
Zone default values applied when minimal data provided
frontend: Login with admin@crowd.sa / admin123
Daily Sessions page loads at /daily-sessions
Mode toolbar visible with Pan, Draw, Edit buttons for draft session
Pan mode is default (hand icon highlighted)
Click Draw mode - Pencil button highlights, shape buttons appear
Shape buttons visible: Circle, Rectangle, Triangle when drawingPoints.length === 0
Click Rectangle shape - generates 4 points, opens new zone dialog immediately
Click Circle shape - generates 24 points, opens new zone dialog immediately
New zone dialog shows: zone code input, zone name input, category selector
Dialog shows message 'تم رسم الشكل بـ X نقطة' with point count
Click 'إضافة المنطقة' (Add Zone) - zone saved to session, toast success
New zone appears on map with correct color and position
Session header updates zone count after adding
Changes summary badge shows '1 مضاف' (1 added)
Edit mode shows instruction: 'انقر على منطقة لتحديدها، اسحب النقاط لتعديلها'
Zoom controls work: Zoom In (125%), Zoom Out, Reset (100%)
Complete session - toolbar hides (Pan/Draw/Edit buttons removed)
Completed session shows only zoom controls (view-only mode)
Reopen session restores toolbar
Zones tab shows zone cards with change type badges
Previous calendar and session list features still working

seed_data_creation: Test zones created during testing were cleaned up. 5 existing sessions remain (Feb 12-15, 22). New zone added via UI (circle shape) persists in Feb 22 session.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Drawing/Editing tools fully tested: 1) Mode toolbar with Pan/Draw/Edit buttons - Pan default. 2) Shape generators (circle 24pts, rectangle 4pts, triangle 3pts) create polygon and immediately open new zone dialog. 3) New zone dialog has zone_code, name, category fields. 4) Edit mode shows instruction text, clicking zone selects it (not tested full drag editing visually due to complexity). 5) Completed sessions hide the toolbar showing only zoom controls (view-only). 6) All zoom controls (in/out/reset) work. 7) Zone saved to session with change_type='added'. Backend APIs for POST/PUT/DELETE session zones all working. Previous features (calendar, source selector, batch entry, zone editing, notes, compare) continue to work.

mode_toolbar.details: Pan/Draw/Edit buttons visible for draft sessions, Pan is default

draw_mode_shapes.details: Circle/Rectangle/Triangle buttons appear when drawingPoints empty, generate correct point counts (24/4/3)

new_zone_dialog.details: Opens after shape click with zone_code, name, category fields. Shows point count message.

save_zone_to_session.details: Zone added via POST API, appears on map and in zones tab, session header updates count

edit_mode_instructions.details: Shows correct Arabic instruction text for selecting and dragging zones

completed_session_view_only.details: Toolbar hidden for completed sessions, only zoom controls shown

zoom_controls.details: Zoom in (125%), zoom out, reset (100%) all working

previous_features_regression.details: Calendar, session list, zone editing, notes all still working
